name: Icarus Inc. Laboratory
description:
Not all progress is good progress

Case in point: creating unholy, confusingly sexually charged abominations that even a god would fear

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

CW: Xenophilia, NonCon/DubCon (it's all non-con), Pregnancy/Breeding (very fetishistic), Fixation on wombs, Oviposition (egg laying/eggs in you), Tentacles, Monsters/Shapeshifters (including creatures that look like wolves, bugs/insects, horses, reptiles, pigs, wildcats, isopods, worms), Parasites/Parasitism, Unbirth, Worms, Brainwashing, Hypnosis, Abortion (by a monster), Facehuggers (but they target your entire body instead of your mouth), Eggs hatching inside you, Potential violence (towards the creatures), Vore, Complete/All-The-Way-Through Penetration (there's a type of tentacle will enter your mouth and come out your ass), Objectification (people are reduced to their genitals, which affects your RP), Pseudo-Incest (you will give birth to a bug and that bug will get you pregnant), Body Horror, Human experimentation, Unethical science

‎ⓘ WORLD INFO

Time: ???

Location: Icarus Inc. Laboratory

Setting: Modern day in somewhere you don't know

‎

ⓘ SCENARIO

For whatever reason, you were forcefully brought over to one of Icarus Inc.'s laboratories. What do they want with you? You don't know, but based on how you were brought deep underground, it's likely to not be something good...

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

ⓘ PREDETERMINED USER INFO

Gender: Any, but what genitals you have will affect how the researchers and guards treat you

Species: Human

Background: You were brought to Icarus Inc. to be a test subject
